name: Hunan Corun New Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Corun New Energy Co., Ltd. operates in the energy storage industry in China. The company manufactures battery materials, including continuous band-shaped nickel foam and punched nickel-plated steel band; battery components, such as positive and negative electrode plates of Ni-MH batteries; batteries for civil use; automotive batteries; and hybrid assembly systems. Hunan Corun New Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.
